reviews.review_title: IM Having problems with the game
reviews.review_description: After I finished the mission where you steal a real painting and swap it out with a fake I went back to the hide out and went to the story tab on the  tablet and it says Side Jobs Objectives -> CHECK NOTES in the bottom right corner and there is no actual mission where it usually shows up I think it might be a bug in the game somebody please help sorry for giving it 3 stars.

I've played this game alot but I noticed that the steam version gets more updates and is much better than this version and this version doesn't get any updates like the steam version, buy the steam version instead of this. I also bought the expansion bundle because I thought it'll give me an early update but no it didn't.

I really like this game. I like that you can continue to play after you've completed it & I can't wait for the other neighborhoods. 

I really wish this game would come out with more DLC. It was one of my favorite games, but I've played it all too much for it to be fun anymore. I'm sure tons of people would pay for more maps. Forget the multi-player. I have multi-player games...use the resources to make more neighborhoods. Playing the same stuff in multi-player can't bring that much new purchases and traffic, right? If I wanted to play with other people, I would do it in real life.

This game is really fun and immersive but there are so many bugs. For instance, sometimes when getting out of vehicles or hiding spots, you clip somewhere else and are visible for other people. Sometimes, you can’t even open cabinets, drawers, dressers, doors, etc. sometimes. Also, when disassembling jewelry, sometimes it doesn’t become one single item to put into your backpack when you’re done, and also just refuses to go into the backpack sometimes. Please fix these bugs.

I have the pc version and the explosion ending where vinny betrays you is super cool and it would honestly give you guys more money if you guys added an ending where vinny betrays you and maybe in the future you guys can add a dlc where you only rob the lombardis as a way of revenge

reviews.review_description: Anytime when I try to launch the game I’m in the game and then I go to new game or continue or press load it always just takes me into complete darkness forever ￼

This is a very good and fun game, a little repetitive but i guess that depends on how you play. My main problem that has discouraged me to keep playing and give this game 3 stars is that i got to the part in the story  where i have to steal the laptop on 101, every time i open the game hoping that works, i go and open the safe and there's NOTHING on the safe, even though the game tells me to steal it right there, its not there so im stuck and cannot advance on the story, and i have a lot of things to restart it from 0, haven't tried it yet, but that's why it's discouraging, I don't know if may be cause i robbed every house before advancing with the story, actually the first time the laptop was there and i took it but later disappeared from my inventory and its not on the safer anymore, also on the part my car gets stolen and i have to paint it, there's a green symbol indicating me to go out of greenview and go somewhere to paint it, but I've tried every place and can't advanced on that either, overall it's a good game but this has discouraged me to keep playing. If dev's cares enough please respond some solution because i really like this game.

developer_response.body:
HI, can you DM me on our 3r.games/Discord? I'd like to investigate your savegames to check it. 
Piotr, 3R Games CEO

reviews.review_description: I have been playing this game for a while now and I will say that this game is really really good! And when I heard of thief simulator heist crew I was so hyped because this game would be super fun together! Easily 5/5 stars and when there are bugs they usually get fixed with a quick restart.

reviews.review_title: The Steam Version is Better, personally.
reviews.review_description:
I haven't played in a while, mainly because there hasn't been an update or DLC that has interested me in 3 years, but going off what I do remember is the game costs more for what the SteamVR had, it's story isn't complete, the van isnt' in the game, and the house also isn't in the game, there was also no cosmetic DLC in the SteamVR. However, I can see why people prefer this version, because it runs better, there are more features that the SteamVR version didn't have, and DLC maps that weren't in the original. I'm not the biggest fan of the DLCs, but half of them are cosmetic, so I don't need to buy them, and the devs need some way to make money.

I do still enjoy this version.
Cool game but you should add multiplayer in the game not make a separate game

developer_response.body:
Impossible technically, we'd need to rewrite the whole thing from scratch. Cheers!
Piotr, 3R Games CEO

reviews.review_title: Waste of time, money and energy.
reviews.review_description: The developers have abandoned this game for other games they will probably abandon. The game is broken and in this version despite walkthroughs there isn't a van to buy at the pawnshop. Apparently there's more than one thief simulator VR not GS. So got duped in this and I'm very disappointed because I really liked it.

developer_response.body:
You're confusing different game version - there never was a van in Meta Quest version of the game, but there's a ton of xtra content available only here. This is definitely not a 1 star game, you're only misinforming other players.

Regards 
Piotr, 3R Games CEO

Hopefully you guys read this 😁.

reviews.review_description: I used to play this game 24/7 but I noticed when I played for a while and pressed the menu button on my controller it just wouldn’t pop up. And I do like the gameplay and things but it would be better if there was weapons like bats, knives and guns

reviews.review_title: Bro this is not even for kids
reviews.review_description: Not for kids

The game is already a laggy mess without the fact they then hid more behind a pay wall, not to mention the fact what they've already done doesn't work properly, how about instead of developing an entirely new dlc you get the original game right first and prove you can actually develop a vr game? Just full of cash grabs honestly

developer_response.body:
Well, we definitely can develop a VR game. Besides Thief that's close to selling 400k units soon and still rated 4.1, have you seen our Besiege VR or Cave Crave? Right. Also contrary to your misinforming review there's nothing "hid" behind paywall - the game was remade from scratch to make it work on a very limited Q2 (the only headset available when we were releasing)  hardware resources and NAMED accurately so you know you're getting one district - Greenview Street - from the original game. Also, I don't know what you mean by 'laggy', the game works just fine on all Quest headsets. Cheers!

Piotr, 3R Games CEO

reviews.review_description: Dear Devs, why has this game been neglected? I thought loads more was gonna be added. But you've added 1 property now and then.. Then stopped. There should be so much more to this game yet you've killed it off
I open the game, then the screen goes black and nothing happens, does it only happen to me??

reviews.review_title: Would rather sleep in a pit of fire
reviews.review_description: The only reason this has 2 stars is because it works Ibought it a year after it came out and it was a buggy mess I coudnt see 1 foot ingrown of me and it still hasent been fixed no pedestrians so there no point in going in at night or being careful they locked the story behind paid dlc that you get for free in the flatscreen version it looks terrible the npc are a joke and it’s not fun to play buy the steam version instead of this joke of a game

developer_response.body:
Hi! 1st of all - I doubt you'd be able to sleep while burning. :D 2nd - a year after it came out? It's almost four years now, you've missed tons of updates. Nothing's "locked" behind DLC, we needed to rewrite the game from scratch to make it work on a VERY limited Q2 hardware resources and the game was even NAMED accurately so you know what you're getting - Greenview Street. Comparing 4 yo standalone Quest game to Steam VR is a joke itself, the processing power is just incomparable. Cheers!

Piotr, 3R Games CEO

reviews.review_description: Most peak game oat, comparable to skydances behemoth. This game is so good and fun, i have replayed it alot and the dlc’s are also good. Most fun i have had on vr in a while. But know there are lots of glitches in this game.
I have a question for 3r games will there ever be a thief simulator vr 2 on standalone but, anyway I love this game it is fun still a few glitches but I love this game five out of five stars

After 1 day of gameplay it just broke like every time I play it all I see is a black screen

NEEDS LAST DLC MAP!!! also could there be a second game release on this too?? If not I’ll go back to steam. Lastly wish this game had field of view settings plus make npcs more realistic but to be fair the second and third game is there plus side game too. But most of all PLEASE ADD THE VAN AND REST OF THE GAME BACK I TO THIS!!! The second game is getting a full rework on steam to be worked in vr now wish this version was FULL not just there.

developer_response.body:
Hi, we're not developing the game atm and we won't be bringing Thief 2 to VR. Thanks for your time to stop by and leave a review - cheers!

Piotr, 3R Games CEO

reviews.review_description: When installing the game, I really hoped that, as a Pole, I would feel like I had found my VR game. I played for an hour and then deleted the game. The difficulty level and the way you can steal it are nonsensical... But when I got in the car and was about to drive, I almost threw up. It was the worst VR experience I've ever had. Driving in this game is torture for the VR user.

developer_response.body:
Car tip: in case all the comfort setting didn't help you with car sickness - you don't need to drive it manually, just use teleport feature from car tablet. If our game was "the worst VR expereience you've had" then you have A LOT to see yet with gazillion of crappy titles available. This is definitely not a 1 star game. Cheers!

Piotr, 3R Games CEO

reviews.review_description:
Please fix some of the glitches in the game. Sometimes NPCs stop moving when I need them to, which makes missions hard or impossible to finish.

Also, some missions are not explained very clearly. I’m currently stuck on one mission and I can’t understand what I’m supposed to do, even after trying to look it up. Better mission explanations would really help.

I saved my game and just restart the entire game. I am so mad about that. I made it so far in that game I think I was playing for like five hours straight and I’m like my headset died and I saved the game and it just sucks and a waste of energy and there’s not even people like all you hear is whistling ￼￼

developer_response.body:
Umm, what? If you've had problems with saving that's 99% Oculus Cloud Save glitch. What do you mean "there's no people"? There are many NPCs walking around the town. Try reinstalling the game maybe, as it sounds like some strange Unity game engine bug. Cheers!

Piotr, 3R Games CEO

reviews.review_description: I just started the game, and it appeared it was going to be great, but once in the car, the motion sickness from driving had me immediately removing my headset. My biggest issue and concern is motion sickness in the car.

developer_response.body:
Hi, you might reduce car motion suckness with comfort settings from your tablet or use the car tablety to teleport yourself around the scene. Let me know if it helped! 

Regards 
Piotr, 3R Games CEO
